scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n core,web -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @octoflash/core" "npm run dev -w @octoflash/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -n core,web,desktop -c green,blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @octoflash/core" "npm run dev -w @octoflash/web" "npm run dev -w @octoflash/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @octoflash/core && npm run build -w @octoflash/web && npm run build -w @octoflash/desktop
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @octoflash/core && npm run build -w @octoflash/web
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w @octoflash/desktop
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run pack -w @octoflash/desktop
